Class BackgroundMusicTrack

java.lang.Object
java.util.AbstractCollection<javafx.scene.media.MediaPlayer>
java.util.AbstractList<javafx.scene.media.MediaPlayer>
java.util.ArrayList<javafx.scene.media.MediaPlayer>
util.wrapper.BackgroundMusicTrack
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable, Iterable<javafx.scene.media.MediaPlayer>, Collection<javafx.scene.media.MediaPlayer>, List<javafx.scene.media.MediaPlayer>, RandomAccess, SequencedCollection<javafx.scene.media.MediaPlayer>
public class BackgroundMusicTrack extends ArrayList<javafx.scene.media.MediaPlayer>
Represents a background music track.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • BackgroundMusicTrack

      public BackgroundMusicTrack(String name, BackgroundMusicTrack.TrackMode mode)
      Constructs a new BackgroundMusicTrack.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the track
      mode - the playback mode (LOOP or REPEAT_LAST)

  • Method Details

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Gets the name of the music track.
      Returns:
      the track name

    • addMusic

      public void addMusic(String fileName)
      Adds a music file to the track.
      Parameters:
      fileName - the name of the music file to add

    • addMusics

      public void addMusics(String... fileNames)
      Adds multiple music files to the track.
      Parameters:
      fileNames - an array or varargs of music file names

    • startTrack

      public void startTrack()
      Starts playing the music track from the first song.

    • nextMusic

      public void nextMusic()
      Advances to the next music in the track based on the track mode.

    • skipToLast

      public void skipToLast()
      Skip to the last music of the track

    • play

      private void play()
      Plays the current music internally.

    • stopTrack

      public void stopTrack()
      Stops the currently playing music track.
